mapper.select: SELECT ea.*, er.roomName, er.roomLocation FROM exam_arrange ea LEFT JOIN exam_room er ON ea.roomId = er.roomId ORDER BY ea.arrangeDate, ea.session, ea.arrangeId
SELECT ea.*, er.roomName, er.roomLocation FROM exam_arrange ea LEFT JOIN exam_room er ON ea.roomId = er.roomId WHERE ea.examCode = #{examCode} ORDER BY ea.arrangeDate, ea.session
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_arrange (examCode, roomId, arrangeDate, session, startTime, endTime, totalSeats, assignedSeats, status) VALUES (#{examCode}, #{roomId}, #{arrangeDate}, #{session}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{totalSeats}, 0, '0')
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_arrange SET roomId = #{roomId}, arrangeDate = #{arrangeDate}, session = #{session}, startTime = #{startTime}, endTime = #{endTime}, totalSeats = #{totalSeats}, status = #{status} WHERE arrangeId = #{arrangeId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(totalSeats), 0) FROM exam_arrange WHERE examCode = #{examCode} AND status IN ('0', '1')
SELECT ea.*, er.roomName, er.roomLocation FROM exam_arrange ea LEFT JOIN exam_room er ON ea.roomId = er.roomId WHERE ea.arrangeId = #{arrangeId}
